scripts.build:api: npm run build:interfaces && npm --workspace output run build
scripts.build:ui: npm run build:interfaces && npm --workspace output-ui run build
scripts.build:ui:prod: npm run build:interfaces && npm --workspace output-ui run build:prod
scripts.start:api: npm run build:interfaces && npm --workspace output run start
scripts.start:ui: npm run build:interfaces && npm --workspace output-ui run start
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:interfaces && concurrently -k -n interfaces,api "npm run watch:interfaces" "npm --workspace output run start:dev"
scripts.dev:ui: npm run build:interfaces && concurrently -k -n interfaces,ui "npm run watch:interfaces" "npm --workspace output-ui run start"
scripts.dev: npm run build:interfaces && concurrently -k -n interfaces,api,ui "npm run watch:interfaces" "npm --workspace output run start:dev" "npm --workspace output-ui run start"
